# wildcard-star-slash

Wildcard GVK */* via split key *_* and monolithic */* maps to group/kind *

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/resource-customizations/wildcard-star-slash` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  # Split-key form: underscores stand in for '/' so *_* is the */* wildcard GVK.
  "resource.customizations.health.*_*": |
    hs = {}
    hs.status = "Healthy"
    return hs
  "resource.customizations.useOpenLibs.*_*": "true"
  # Monolithic blob form uses the literal */* key (same override as "all").
  resource.customizations: |
    "*/*":
      ignoreDifferences:
        jsonPointers:
          - /metadata/resourceVersion
      ignoreResourceUpdates:
        jsonPointers:
          - /metadata/generation
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  controller:
    resource:
      health:
      - group: '*'
        healthLua: |
          hs = {}
          hs.status = "Healthy"
          return hs
        kind: '*'
        useOpenLibs: true
      ignoreDifferences:
      - group: '*'
        jsonPointers:
        - /metadata/resourceVersion
        kind: '*'
      ignoreResourceUpdates:
      - group: '*'
        jsonPointers:
        - /metadata/generation
        kind: '*'
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  resource.customizations.health.all: |
    hs = {}
    hs.status = "Healthy"
    return hs
  resource.customizations.ignoreDifferences.all: |
    jsonPointers:
    - /metadata/resourceVersion
  resource.customizations.ignoreResourceUpdates.all: |
    jsonPointers:
    - /metadata/generation
  resource.customizations.useOpenLibs.all: "true"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml

  key: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-rbac-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
```
